name: Compucase Enterprise Co., Ltd.
summary: Compucase Enterprise Co., Ltd. designs and manufactures LED drivers, PC cases, power supplies, rackmount chassis, cabinets, LED luminaire, and LED panels worldwide. The company offers its products under the HEC brand to OEM customers, system integrators, industrial users, and retail customers. Compucase Enterprise Co., Ltd. was founded in 1979 and is headquartered in Tainan City, Taiwan.
